title: Epic: Publish Taskulus Rust crate to crates.io
description: Prepare and publish Taskulus Rust crate (CLI/lib) to crates.io alongside Python package; align metadata, versioning, and release automation.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_notes:
Publish Taskulus Rust crate to crates.io once config standardization and dependencies (dot-yml crate tskl-9nu) are ready; align release automation with Python package.
Created child task tskl-pjb.1 to publish Taskulus crate to crates.io (post config parity and dotyaml crate availability).
Epic complete: taskulus crate 0.1.0 published to crates.io with MIT license and updated metadata; supporting tasks tskl-pjb.1/.2/.3/.4 closed.
